idea-plugin.name: ResXFileCodeGeneratorEx
idea-plugin.description:
A Rider/ReSharper port of the classic ResXFileCodeGeneratorEx Visual Studio custom tool.

When set as the Custom Tool for a .resx file, it generates a .Designer.cs companion file containing:

  • Strongly-typed static properties for every resource entry
  • XML doc-comments describing each resource
  • XxxFormat(object arg0, …) convenience methods for strings that contain {0}, {1}, … placeholders
  • A nested ResourceNames class exposing every resource key as a constant
  • Thread-safe ResourceManager and overridable Culture property

The generated .Designer.cs is kept byte-compatible with the original Visual Studio ResXFileCodeGeneratorEx custom tool, so Rider and Visual Studio users on the same team can regenerate the same file without spurious diffs.

Two tool names are supported:

  • ResXFileCodeGeneratorEx — generates a public class
  • ResXFileCodeGeneratorExInternal — generates an internal class

Set the custom tool in Rider via Properties → Custom Tool on any .resx file, or by adding <Generator>ResXFileCodeGeneratorEx</Generator> to the <EmbeddedResource> item in your .csproj.
